{PAWN_nameDef} is a Mechanical Wula. Wulas think differently from ordinary people; under extreme stress, their simulated personality will completely collapse.
LanguageData.WULA_Trait_WhitePaper.degreeDatas.0.desc: [PAWN_nameDef]'s memory banks are mostly empty. [PAWN_pronoun] can learn quickly and shape [PAWN_possessive]self.
LanguageData.WULA_Trait_Knight.degreeDatas.0.label: Imperial Knight
LanguageData.WULA_Trait_Knight.degreeDatas.0.descript:
My body belongs beneath the Emperor's sword,
My name is blessed by the Emperor,
I travel through the boundless sea of stars,
And I swear by my soul to the Emperor:

Always treat the Empire's people with kindness; always show compassion to the helpless and the weak.
Always show mercy to innocent women and children; always regard all living beings as equals.

Always purge the Empire's traitors in the name of valor; always slay the Empire's enemies in the name of a knight.
Always raze rebel cities in the name of the Empire; always cleanse the endless cosmos in the name of the Emperor.

Always contemplate the Empire's troubles with wisdom; always answer ignorant doubts with patience.
Always discern life's truths with devotion; always guide billions of citizens with faith.

Always explore the Empire's domains with the will to discover; always seek the unknown with the will to learn.
Always follow the Emperor's footsteps with tenacity; always scrutinize the truths of the star-sea with a seeking heart.

I am the Emperor's shield, and I am the Emperor's sword.
In the name of the Wula Emperor, I am an Imperial Knight!
LanguageData.WULA_Trait_Legal_Officer.degreeDatas.0.d: Legal officers are frontline enforcers of the Wula Empire's knight orders. They are well trained in shooting, and they have the smooth tongue needed to suppress and placate slaves.
LanguageData.WULA_Trait_Sculptor.degreeDatas.0.label: Sculptor
LanguageData.WULA_Trait_Sculptor.degreeDatas.0.descri: Sculptors are scientists at the Wula Empire Observatory. They treat gene editing as the ultimate artistic medium, and living organisms as raw materials—creating one-of-a-kind \"living artworks\" with striking aesthetic value or philosophical meaning.
LanguageData.WULA_Trait_Diplomat.degreeDatas.0.label: Diplomat
LanguageData.WULA_Trait_Diplomat.degreeDatas.0.descri: Wula Empire diplomats are known as Heralds. Even their polished etiquette can't hide the arrogance and condescension of a fallen empire.
LanguageData.WULA_Trait_Nun.degreeDatas.0.label: Nun
LanguageData.WULA_Trait_Nun.degreeDatas.0.description: Wula Empire nuns are the backbone of the Grand Cathedral. They cast aside the pampered life of a fallen empire and carry out preaching crusades in person to uphold their devout faith.
LanguageData.WULA_Trait_Researcher.degreeDatas.0.desc: To uncover and preserve the Wula Empire's lost knowledge, the archivists of the Imperial Library tirelessly wade through an ocean of books.
LanguageData.WULA_Trait_Connector.degreeDatas.0.label: High-dimensional linker
LanguageData.WULA_Trait_Connector.degreeDatas.0.descr: After maintaining a cross-dimensional link with an extraplanar installation for so long, these Wulas have gradually become less human.
LanguageData.WULA_Trait_Broken_Personality.degreeData: This Wula Empire synth lacks a complete personality, making them more like a true machine.
